items.title: The months of planning behind US-Israeli mission to target Iran's supreme leader
items.summary: A piece of crucial intelligence arrived just hours before the attack on a compound in central Tehran.

items.title: Two ships hit near Strait of Hormuz as fears grow of oil price rises
items.summary: International shipping is said to have come to a standstill at the strait's entrance, with fears of disruption already pushing up global oil prices.

items.title: 'It's eerie' - Dubai on edge as city comes under attack by Iran
items.summary: One British holidaymaker called it "surreal" to see people try to enjoy themselves as smoke rises nearby.

items.title: At least 153 dead after reported strike on school, Iran says
items.summary: Iran has blamed the US and Israel for the strike; the US is looking into reports of the incident, while the IDF says it is "not aware" of operations in the area.

items.title: In maps: Strikes across Iran and the Middle East
items.summary: Israel and the US continue strikes on Iran, while Iran steps up attacks across the region in retaliation for the death of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei.

items.title: انفجارهای متعدد در تهران؛ ترامپ: عملیات جلوتر از برنامه پیش می‌رود
items.summary: دونالد ترامپ می‌گوید که عملیات جلوتر از برنامه پیش می‌رود و آمریکا ۹ شناور نیروی دریایی ایران را «غرق کرده است و بقیه آن‌ها هم به زودی کف دریا خواهند بود.» رئیس‌جمهور آمریکا همچنین گفت که رهبری جدید ایران درخواست گفت‌وگ…

items.title: خبر کشته‌شدن علی خامنه‌ای چگونه اعلام شد؟
items.summary: اولین حمله آمریکا و اسرائیل به ایران حدود ساعت ۹:۴۵ صبح شنبه به وقت تهران انجام شد و حدود ساعت ۵:۰۰ صبح یکشنبه رسما خبر کشته شدن رهبر جمهوری اسلامی اعلام شد درحالی‌که مقامات ابتدا از سلامت او خبر می‌دادند. در اینجا نگاه…

items.title: تشکیل شورای موقت رهبری؛ علیرضا اعرافی کیست؟
items.summary: پس از کشته شدن علی خامنه‌ای، طبق قانون اساسی شورای موقت رهبری از رئیس‌جمهور، رئیس قوه قضاییه و نماینده از فقهای شورای نگهبان (علیرضا اعرافی) تشکیل می‌شود. علیرضا اعرافی مورد اعتماد علی خامنه‌ای بود و در حلقه نزدیکان او…

items.title: بزرگ‌ترین قمار ترامپ: تغییر حکومت در ایران
items.summary: دونالد ترامپ، رئیس‌جمهور ایالات متحده، با حمله به ایران و کشتن رهبر این کشور، دست به قمار بزرگی زده است: اینکه بتواند جایی موفق شود که روسای‌جمهور پیشین آمریکا ناکام مانده‌اند و با استفاده از قدرت نظامی ایالات متحده، خا…

items.title: جمهوری اسلامی در «نبرد بقا» در جنگی که پایانش نا‌مشخص است
items.summary: پس از آنکه ایالات متحده و اسرائیل یک کارزار نظامی بی‌سابقه با هدف تغییر رژیم در ایران آغاز کردند، رهبری این کشور با آنچه تحلیلگران آن را آزمونی موجودیتی توصیف می‌کنند روبه‌رو شده است وهیچ مسیر روشن یا کم‌خطری برای رسیدن…

items.title: 🔴 صداوسیما هدف قرار گرفت؛ انهدام قرارگاه‌ «ثارالله» و ستاد کل نیروهای انتظامی
items.summary: ارتش دفاعی اسرائیل روز یکشنبه ۱۰ اسفند اعلام کرد که ستاد کل نیروهای انتظامی، قرارگاه‌های ثارالله «رژیم تروریستی ایران» را منهدم کرده است.

items.title: ونس: هیچ احتمالی مبنی بر این وجود ندارد که اقدام نظامی علیه جمهوری اسلامی به جنگی طولانی در خاورمیانه منجر شود
items.summary: جی‌دی ونس معاون رئیس‌جمهور آمریکا روز پنج‌شنبه در گفت‌وگو با واشنگتن‌پست به شرح دیدگاه خود درباره احتمال اقدام نظامی ایالات متحده علیه جمهوری اسلامی پرداخت و گفت «هیچ احتمالی وجود ندارد» که چنین حمله‌ای به جنگی طولانی‌م…

items.title: سناتور گراهام: در نهایت باید آیت‌الله را از میان برداریم؛ هیچ توافقی ماهیّت رهبری جمهوری اسلامی را تغییر نمی‌دهد
items.summary: لیندزی گراهام، سناتور جمهوری‌خواه آمریکا، در اظهاراتی تازه درباره جمهوری اسلامی گفت که هیچ توافقی نمی‌تواند «ماهیت» رهبری ایران را تغییر دهد؛ «در نهایت، باید آیت‌الله را از میان برداریم».

items.title: رئیس جمهوری آمریکا: تصمیم‌گیری درباره هرگونه اقدام نظامی احتمالی علیه ایران با من است
items.summary: دونالد ترامپ، رئیس جمهوری ایالات متحده، با رد برخی گزارش‌ها درباره مخالفت رئیس ستاد مشترک نیروهای مسلح آمریکا با انجام عملیات نظامی آمریگا علیه حکومت ایران، تاکید کرد که او فرد تصمیم‌گیرنده در این‌باره است.

items.title: دونالد ترامپ تحلیل مارک لوین را بازنشر کرد؛ مشکل اصلی خود رژیم است، نه توافق
items.summary: دونالد ترامپ ویدئویی از سخنان مارک لوین، تحلیلگر محافظه‌کار آمریکایی را بازنشر کرد که در آن می‌گوید حتی بهترین توافق با جمهوری اسلامی هم حاصل شود، چون ماهیت این رژیم تروریستی است، به آن عمل نمی‌کند و باید رژیم ایران عوض…

items.summary: Footage from the Strait of Hormuz shows an oil tanker ablaze after a reported hit from an unidentified projectile.

items.title: “Trump chose an avoidable war over a good deal.”
items.summary: Trita Parsi says Iran had offered major nuclear concessions and that Trump could have claimed diplomatic victory.

items.title: Who are the council members temporarily in charge of Iran?
items.summary: Until Khamenei's successor is picked, three-member leadership council, including Ayatollah Arafi, will lead Iran.

items.title: Ghana says at least 55 of its people killed after Russia ‘lured’ them to fight Ukraine
items.summary: Foreign minister says 272 Ghanaians are thought to have been drawn into battle since 2022, after he visited Kyiv At least 55 Ghanaians have been killed in Russia’s war with Ukraine after being “lured into battle”, Ghana…

items.title: Rising anger over ‘lop-sided’ and ‘immoral’ US health funding pacts with African countries
items.summary: Zimbabwe refuses to sign agreement and Kenya faces a court case over data sharing as new aid deals come under scrutiny A series of bilateral health agreements being negotiated between African countries and the administr…

items.title: Two women arrested in Uganda for allegedly kissing in public could face life sentence
items.summary: Wendy Faith and Alesi Diana Denise were taken into custody under laws that have outraged LGBTQ+ community and rights activists Two women have been arrested and detained in Uganda after allegedly kissing in public, an ac…

items.title: ‘A devastating force’: how recent storms turned to tragedies across the western Mediterranean
items.summary: Atmospheric machine-gun has fired storm after deadly storm at the region this year, leaving a trail of widespread destruction For Andrés Sánchez Barea, in Spain, it was the fear that arose when water started to spurt fr…

items.title: US accused of ‘shameless exploitation’ over proposed Zambian health aid deal
items.summary: Leaked draft of $1bn memorandum of understanding reveals mandatory targets, sharing of data, and reported access to mining concessions The US has been accused of “shameless exploitation” over a health financing agreemen…

items.title: Mideast clashes breach Olympic truce as athletes gather for Winter Paralympic Games
items.summary: Fighting intensified in the Middle East during the Olympic truce, in effect through March 15. Flights are being disrupted as athletes and families converge on Italy for the Winter Paralympics.

items.title: A U.S. scholarship thrills a teacher in India. Then came the soul-crushing questions
items.summary: She was thrilled to become the first teacher from a government-sponsored school in India to get a Fulbright exchange award to learn from U.S. schools. People asked two questions that clouded her joy.

items.title: Three American soldiers killed as U.S.-Israeli strikes in Iran continue into 2nd day
items.summary: Another five soldiers were critically injured, according to the U.S. Central Command. They mark the first American casualties since the start of operation 'Epic Fury' on Saturday.

items.title: Trump warns Iran not to retaliate after Ayatollah Ali Khamenei is killed
items.summary: The Iranian government has announced 40 days of mourning. The country's supreme leader was killed following an attack launched by the U.S. and Israel on Saturday against Iran.

items.title: Explosion rocks Iran's capital as Israel says it is targeting the city
items.summary: Iran fired missiles at targets in Israel and Gulf Arab states Sunday after vowing massive retaliation for the killing of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei by the United States and Israel.

iran.title: The months of planning behind US-Israeli mission to target Iran's supreme leader
iran.summary: A piece of crucial intelligence arrived just hours before the attack on a compound in central Tehran.

iran.title: 'It's eerie' - Dubai on edge as city comes under attack by Iran
iran.summary: One British holidaymaker called it "surreal" to see people try to enjoy themselves as smoke rises nearby.

iran.title: At least 153 dead after reported strike on school, Iran says
iran.summary: Iran has blamed the US and Israel for the strike; the US is looking into reports of the incident, while the IDF says it is "not aware" of operations in the area.

iran.title: In maps: Strikes across Iran and the Middle East
iran.summary: Israel and the US continue strikes on Iran, while Iran steps up attacks across the region in retaliation for the death of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei.

iran.title: “Trump chose an avoidable war over a good deal.”
iran.summary: Trita Parsi says Iran had offered major nuclear concessions and that Trump could have claimed diplomatic victory.
iran.source: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

iran.title: Moment Iranian drone hits UAE naval base
iran.summary: Video from Abu Dhabi captured the moment a second Iranian drone struck the Al Salam Naval Base.
iran.source: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

iran.title: Who are the council members temporarily in charge of Iran?
iran.summary: Until Khamenei's successor is picked, three-member leadership council, including Ayatollah Arafi, will lead Iran.
iran.source: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

iran.title: Three American soldiers killed as U.S.-Israeli strikes in Iran continue into 2nd day
iran.summary: Another five soldiers were critically injured, according to the U.S. Central Command. They mark the first American casualties since the start of operation 'Epic Fury' on Saturday.

iran.title: Trump warns Iran not to retaliate after Ayatollah Ali Khamenei is killed
iran.summary: The Iranian government has announced 40 days of mourning. The country's supreme leader was killed following an attack launched by the U.S. and Israel on Saturday against Iran.

iran.title: Explosion rocks Iran's capital as Israel says it is targeting the city
iran.summary: Iran fired missiles at targets in Israel and Gulf Arab states Sunday after vowing massive retaliation for the killing of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei by the United States and Israel.
